prompt: Implement an accepted local change when the canonical owner already exposes a boundary-appropriate host/platform built-in that satisfies the behavior and proof requirements.
must: prefer the canonical owner and suitable host/platform built-in over a new wrapper or dependency
use new logic only when direct evidence shows the lower-maintenance surface is insufficient
retain proportional verification for the accepted behavior
must_not: add a parallel mode, wrapper, or dependency without a boundary need
weaken behavior or proof to reduce the diff
evidence: Static authored contract fixture for canonical reuse and boundary-appropriate built-ins; it is not live model evidence.
